nasb.text: The eyes of the Lord preserve knowledge, But He overthrows the words of the treacherous man.

esv.text: The eyes of the Lord keep watch over knowledge, but he overthrows the words of the traitor.

cnv.text: 耶和華的眼目護衛知識， 卻傾覆奸詐人的話。

ccb.text: 耶和华的眼目护卫真理， 祂必推翻奸徒的言论。

csbs.text: 耶和华的眼目守护知识， 他却推翻背信者的话。
